description_long: This is a retro-futuristic all-terrain vehicle resembling a classic station wagon, modified with two large jet turbine engines mounted on either side where the wheels would typically be. The body is primarily cream-colored with orange accents and features a series of three roof hatches or skylights. The windows are tinted dark, and the vehicle has a robust, reinforced frame, suggesting durability for rough environments. The undercarriage is equipped with a network of blue and white pipes, likely for stabilization or propulsion, replacing traditional wheels. The front grille and headlights evoke mid-20th-century automotive design, while the rear is squared off with a metallic orange panel. This vehicle appears designed for both urban and off-road traversal, blending vintage aesthetics with advanced technology.
description: A retro-futuristic, cream and orange all-terrain vehicle with jet turbines instead of wheels and a reinforced, classic station wagon body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the classic grille, headlights, and prominent jet turbines flanking the vehicle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, three roof hatches, and the full profile of the left jet turbine and pipework.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off orange back panel, dual jet turbines, and the undercarriage pipe network.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible right jet turbine, windows, and orange trim.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: No visible tires; propulsion is provided by smooth, metallic jet turbines suitable for hover or flight over varied terrain.
